01 / Mountains

Where earth
touches sky.

Glaciers, wind, and nights that rewrite what quiet means.

08 days From $2,940 Host Amara 3 seats left

Patagonia

This is wind country — big light, bigger silence, and trails that ask more of your legs than your phone. You’ll move between lake edges and ridgelines with Amara reading the weather the way most people read a map.

Days stay intentionally loose: a long hike when the sky clears, an early turn back when it doesn’t. Nights gather at Ridge Cabin — stone, timber, and a table that fills slowly.

Day 01
Arrive soft

Quiet transfer, unpack, and a walk that teaches you the local rhythm.

Day 02–04
Wander wide

Lake circuits, glacier viewpoints, and the wrong turns that become the story.

Day 05
Feast slowly

Shared table at the cabin — local cooks, long toasts, no rush.

Day 06–07
Go deep

A harder ridgeline day for those who want it, softer paths for those who don’t.

Day 08
Leave lighter

Morning coffee, one last look, a transfer that doesn’t hurry you.

Trip details

  • Length08 days
  • From$2,940
  • HostAmara
  • StayRidge Cabin
  • DatesMar 12–19 · 2026
  • Seats3 seats left
